query:
You are working on the wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 24.12 (commit: e01610c0).

## Issue to Resolve

[Reader IA - Bug] Followed P2s feed not showing in drop-down
![image](https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/assets/47797566/e0725f07-6802-477c-9f39-d6bbe0baa8ea)

>While comparing the viewpager tabs and feeds content for before / after, I see a missing menu item for "Followed P2S" (that is a filterable with only Sites and no Tags elements, I think similarly to the Automattic item)

What I was trying to say here is (using the same user for the before/after):
- the "Followed P2s" item is missing in the after

About how to get the Followed P2s on your side, what follows is my best guess
>I think that menu is related to P2 the product sites that I think I created in that account from https://p2help.wordpress.com/getting-started/creating-a-new-workspace/ if it's useful to create the test scenario.

but I can share my test account with you if it's quicker (just dm me in slack 👍 )

_Originally posted by @develric in https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/issues/19856#issuecomment-1881059568_

## Additional Context from Issue Discussion

We should also consider adding the analytics event for when this menu item is clicked.

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/reader/ReaderConstants.java`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/reader/ReaderPostListFragment.java`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/reader/tracker/ReaderTracker.kt`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/reader/utils/ReaderTopBarMenuHelper.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.tracker
  2→
  3→import android.net.Uri
  4→import androidx.annotation.MainThread
  5→import org.wordpress.android.analytics.AnalyticsTracker
  6→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderPost
  7→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTag
  8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.prefs.AppPrefsWrapper
  9→import org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.ReaderTypes.ReaderPostListType
 10→import org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.utils.DateProvider
 11→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog
 12→import org.wordpress.android.util.DateTimeUtils
 13→import org.wordpress.android.util.analytics.AnalyticsTrackerWrapper
 14→import org.wordpress.android.util.analytics.AnalyticsUtilsWrapper
 15→import javax.inject.Inject
 16→import javax.inject.Singleton
 17→
 18→@Singleton
 19→@MainThread
 20→@Suppress("ForbiddenComment")
 21→class ReaderTracker @Inject constructor(
 22→    private val dateProvider: DateProvider,
 23→    private val appPrefsWrapper: AppPrefsWrapper,
 24→    private val analyticsTrackerWrapper: AnalyticsTrackerWrapper,
 25→    private val analyticsUtilsWrapper: AnalyticsUtilsWrapper
 26→) {
 27→    // TODO: evaluate to use something like Dispatchers.Main.Immediate in the fun(s)
 28→    // to sync the access to trackers; so to remove the @MainThread and make the
 29→    // usage of this class more transparent to its users
 30→    private val trackers = mutableMapOf<ReaderTrackerType, ReaderTrackerInfo>()
 31→
 32→    init {
 33→        for (trackerType in ReaderTrackerType.values()) {
 34→            trackers[trackerType] = ReaderTrackerInfo()
 35→        }
 36→    }
 37→
 38→    fun setupTrackers() {
 39→        for (key in trackers.keys) {
 40→            trackers[key] = ReaderTrackerInfo()
 41→        }
 42→    }
 43→
 44→    fun start(type: ReaderTrackerType) {
 45→        trackers[type]?.let {
 46→            if (!isRunning(type)) {
 47→                AppLog.d(AppLog.T.MAIN, "ReaderTracker: started $type")
 48→                trackers[type] = it.copy(startDate = dateProvider.getCurrentDate())
 49→            }
 50→        }
 51→    }
 52→
 53→    fun stop(type: ReaderTrackerType) {
 54→        trackers[type]?.let { trackerInfo ->
 55→            if (isRunning(type)) {
 56→                AppLog.d(AppLog.T.MAIN, "ReaderTracker: stopped $type")
 57→                trackerInfo.startDate?.let { startDate ->
 58→                    val accumulatedTime = trackerInfo.accumulatedTime +
 59→                            DateTimeUtils.secondsBetween(dateProvider.getCurrentDate(), startDate)
 60→                    // let reset the startDate to null
 61→                    trackers[type] = ReaderTrackerInfo(accumulatedTime = accumulatedTime)
 62→                } ?: AppLog.e(AppLog.T.READER, "ReaderTracker > stop found a null startDate")
 63→            }
 64→        }
 65→    }
 66→
 67→    fun isRunning(type: ReaderTrackerType): Boolean {
 68→        return trackers[type]?.startDate != null
 69→    }
 70→
 71→    fun getAnalyticsData(): Map<String, Any> {
 72→        return trackers.entries.associate { it.key.propertyName to it.value.accumulatedTime }
 73→    }
 74→
 75→    fun trackReaderTabIfNecessary(readerTab: ReaderTab) {
 76→        if (readerTab != appPrefsWrapper.getReaderActiveTab()) {
 77→            when (readerTab) {
 78→                ReaderTab.FOLLOWING -> analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_FOLLOWING_SHOWN)
 79→                ReaderTab.DISCOVER -> analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_DISCOVER_SHOWN)
 80→                ReaderTab.LIKED -> analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_LIKED_SHOWN)
 81→                ReaderTab.SAVED -> analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
 82→                    AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_SAVED_LIST_SHOWN,
 83→                    mapOf("source" to "reader_filter")
 84→                )
 85→                ReaderTab.A8C -> analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_A8C_SHOWN)
 86→                ReaderTab.P2 -> analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_P2_SHOWN)
 87→                ReaderTab.CUSTOM -> analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_CUSTOM_TAB_SHOWN)
 88→            }
 89→            appPrefsWrapper.setReaderActiveTab(readerTab)
 90→        }
 91→    }
 92→
 93→    fun onAppGoesToBackground() {
 94→        appPrefsWrapper.setReaderActiveTab(null)
 95→    }
 96→
 97→    fun onBottomNavigationTabChanged() {
 98→        appPrefsWrapper.setReaderActiveTab(null)
 99→    }
100→
101→    /* TRACK */
102→
103→    fun track(
104→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat
105→    ) {
106→        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(stat)
107→    }
108→
109→    fun track(
110→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
111→        source: String
112→    ) {
113→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
114→            SOURCE_KEY to source
115→        )
116→        track(stat, properties)
117→    }
118→
119→    fun track(
120→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
121→        properties: MutableMap<String, *>
122→    ) {
123→        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(stat, properties)
124→    }
125→
126→    /* BLOG */
127→
128→    fun trackBlog(
129→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
130→        blogId: Long,
131→        feedId: Long
132→    ) {
133→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
134→            BLOG_ID_KEY to blogId(blogId, feedId),
135→            FEED_ID_KEY to feedId
136→        )
137→        track(stat, properties)
138→    }
139→
140→    fun trackBlog(
141→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
142→        blogId: Long,
143→        feedId: Long,
144→        isFollowed: Boolean?
145→    ) {
146→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
147→            BLOG_ID_KEY to blogId(blogId, feedId),
148→            FEED_ID_KEY to feedId,
149→            FOLLOW_KEY to (isFollowed ?: UNKNOWN_VALUE)
150→        )
151→        track(stat, properties)
152→    }
153→
154→    fun trackBlog(
155→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
156→        blogId: Long,
157→        feedId: Long,
158→        source: String
159→    ) {
160→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
161→            BLOG_ID_KEY to blogId(blogId, feedId),
162→            FEED_ID_KEY to feedId,
163→            SOURCE_KEY to source
164→        )
165→        track(stat, properties)
166→    }
167→
168→    fun trackBlog(
169→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
170→        blogId: Long,
171→        feedId: Long,
172→        isFollowed: Boolean?,
173→        source: String
174→    ) {
175→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
176→            BLOG_ID_KEY to blogId(blogId, feedId),
177→            FEED_ID_KEY to feedId,
178→            FOLLOW_KEY to (isFollowed ?: UNKNOWN_VALUE),
179→            SOURCE_KEY to source
180→        )
181→        track(stat, properties)
182→    }
183→
184→    /**
185→     * The [org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderBlog.fromJson] method within this model class has a logic where it
186→     * checks whether the blogs 'blogId' is 0, if it is, then it checks whether the 'feedId' is not 0. If both
187→     * conditions are met then it assigns the 'feedId' to 'blogId'. It does that in order to keep consistency with the
188→     * '/read/' endpoints.
189→     *
190→     * This tracking function captures that and does the opposite in order to make sure that the tracking is done to the
191→     * absolute. As such, it check whether the 'feedId' is equal to the 'blogId' and if so it assigns 0 to the 'blog_id'
192→     * tracking property. Else, as should, it assigns the actual 'blogId' to the 'blog_id' tracking property.
193→     */
194→    private fun blogId(blogId: Long, feedId: Long) = if (feedId == blogId) 0 else blogId
195→
196→    /* TAG */
197→
198→    fun trackTag(
199→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
200→        tag: String,
201→        source: String
202→    ) {
203→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
204→            TAG_KEY to tag,
205→            SOURCE_KEY to source
206→        )
207→        track(stat, properties)
208→    }
209→
210→    fun trackTagQuantity(
211→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
212→        quantity: Int
213→    ) {
214→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
215→            QUANTITY_KEY to quantity
216→        )
217→        track(stat, properties)
218→    }
219→
220→    /* POST */
221→
222→    fun trackBlogPost(
223→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
224→        blogId: Long,
225→        postId: Long
226→    ) {
227→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
228→            BLOG_ID_KEY to blogId,
229→            POST_ID_KEY to postId
230→        )
231→        track(stat, properties)
232→    }
233→
234→    fun trackBlogPost(
235→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
236→        blogId: Long,
237→        postId: Long,
238→        isJetpack: Boolean
239→    ) {
240→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
241→            BLOG_ID_KEY to blogId,
242→            POST_ID_KEY to postId,
243→            IS_JETPACK_KEY to isJetpack
244→        )
245→        track(stat, properties)
246→    }
247→
248→    fun trackBlogPostAuthor(
249→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
250→        blogId: Long,
251→        postId: Long,
252→        isJetpack: Boolean,
253→        userId: Long
254→    ) {
255→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
256→            BLOG_ID_KEY to blogId,
257→            POST_ID_KEY to postId,
258→            IS_JETPACK_KEY to isJetpack,
259→            USER_ID_KEY to userId
260→        )
261→        track(stat, properties)
262→    }
263→
264→    fun trackBlogPost(
265→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
266→        blogId: String,
267→        postId: String,
268→        commentId: Int
269→    ) {
270→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
271→            BLOG_ID_KEY to blogId,
272→            POST_ID_KEY to postId,
273→            COMMENT_ID_KEY to commentId
274→        )
275→        track(stat, properties)
276→    }
277→
278→    fun trackFeedPost(
279→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
280→        feedId: Long,
281→        feedItemId: Long
282→    ) {
283→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
284→            FEED_ID_KEY to feedId,
285→            FEED_ITEM_ID_KEY to feedItemId
286→        )
287→        track(stat, properties)
288→    }
289→
290→    fun trackPost(
291→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
292→        post: ReaderPost?
293→    ) {
294→        trackPost(stat, post, mutableMapOf<String, Any>())
295→    }
296→
297→    fun trackPost(
298→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
299→        post: ReaderPost?,
300→        source: String
301→    ) {
302→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
303→            SOURCE_KEY to source
304→        )
305→        trackPost(stat, post, properties)
306→    }
307→
308→    private fun trackPost(
309→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
310→        post: ReaderPost?,
311→        properties: MutableMap<String, *>
312→    ) {
313→        analyticsUtilsWrapper.trackWithReaderPostDetails(
314→            stat,
315→            post,
316→            properties
317→        )
318→    }
319→
320→    fun trackPostComments(
321→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
322→        blogId: Long,
323→        postId: Long,
324→        post: ReaderPost?,
325→        properties: MutableMap<String, *>
326→    ) {
327→        analyticsUtilsWrapper.trackFollowCommentsWithReaderPostDetails(
328→            stat,
329→            blogId,
330→            postId,
331→            post,
332→            properties
333→        )
334→    }
335→
336→    /* OTHER */
337→
338→    /**
339→     * Track when app launched via deep-linking but then fell back to external browser
340→     *
341→     * @param stat The Stat to bump
342→     * @param interceptedUri The fallback URI the app was started with
343→     */
344→    fun trackUri(
345→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
346→        interceptedUri: String
347→    ) {
348→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
349→            INTERCEPTED_URI_KEY to interceptedUri
350→        )
351→        track(stat, properties)
352→    }
353→
354→    fun trackQuery(
355→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
356→        query: String
357→    ) {
358→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
359→            QUERY_KEY to query
360→        )
361→        track(stat, properties)
362→    }
363→
364→    fun trackDeepLink(
365→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
366→        action: String,
367→        host: String,
368→        uri: Uri?
369→    ) {
370→        analyticsUtilsWrapper.trackWithDeepLinkData(stat, action, host, uri)
371→    }
372→
373→    fun trackRailcar(
374→        railcarJson: String
375→    ) {
376→        analyticsUtilsWrapper.trackRailcarRender(railcarJson)
377→    }
378→
379→    fun trackDropdownMenuOpened() {
380→        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_DROPDOWN_MENU_OPENED)
381→    }
382→
383→    fun trackDropdownMenuItemTapped(readerTag: ReaderTag) {
384→        when {
385→            readerTag.isDiscover -> "discover"
386→            readerTag.isFollowedSites -> "following"
387→            readerTag.isBookmarked -> "saved"
388→            readerTag.isPostsILike -> "liked"
389→            readerTag.isA8C -> "a8c"
390→            readerTag.isListTopic -> "list"
391→            else -> null
392→        }?.let { trackingId ->
393→            analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
394→                stat = AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_DROPDOWN_MENU_ITEM_TAPPED,
395→                properties = mapOf("id" to trackingId)
396→            )
397→        }
398→    }
399→
400→    /* HELPER */
401→
402→    @JvmOverloads
403→    fun getSource(
404→        postListType: ReaderPostListType,
405→        readerTab: ReaderTab? = null
406→    ): String = if (postListType == ReaderPostListType.TAG_FOLLOWED) {
407→        readerTab?.source ?: UNKNOWN_VALUE
408→    } else {
409→        postListType.source
410→    }
411→
412→    companion object {
413→        private const val BLOG_ID_KEY = "blog_id"
414→        private const val POST_ID_KEY = "post_id"
415→        private const val USER_ID_KEY = "user_id"
416→        private const val IS_JETPACK_KEY = "is_jetpack"
417→        private const val COMMENT_ID_KEY = "comment_id"
418→        private const val FEED_ID_KEY = "feed_id"
419→        private const val FEED_ITEM_ID_KEY = "feed_item_id"
420→        private const val FOLLOW_KEY = "follow"
421→        private const val TAG_KEY = "tag"
422→        private const val QUANTITY_KEY = "quantity"
423→        private const val INTERCEPTED_URI_KEY = "intercepted_uri"
424→        private const val QUERY_KEY = "query"
425→
426→        private const val SOURCE_KEY = "source"
427→        const val SOURCE_FOLLOWING = "following"
428→        const val SOURCE_DISCOVER = "discover"
429→        const val SOURCE_LIKED = "liked"
430→        const val SOURCE_SAVED = "saved"
431→        const val SOURCE_CUSTOM = "custom"
432→        const val SOURCE_A8C = "a8c"
433→        const val SOURCE_P2 = "p2"
434→        const val SOURCE_SETTINGS = "subscriptions"
435→        const val SOURCE_SEARCH = "search"
436→        const val SOURCE_SITE_PREVIEW = "site_preview"
437→        const val SOURCE_TAG_PREVIEW = "tag_preview"
438→        const val SOURCE_POST_DETAIL = "post_detail"
439→        const val SOURCE_POST_DETAIL_TOOLBAR = "post_detail_toolbar"
440→        const val SOURCE_POST_DETAIL_COMMENT_SNIPPET = "post_detail_comment_snippet"
441→        const val SOURCE_COMMENT = "comment"
442→        const val SOURCE_USER = "user"
443→        const val SOURCE_STATS = "stats"
444→        const val SOURCE_NOTIFICATION = "notification"
445→        const val SOURCE_READER_LIKE_LIST = "reader_like_list"
446→        const val SOURCE_READER_LIKE_LIST_USER_PROFILE = "reader_like_list_user_profile"
447→        const val SOURCE_NOTIF_LIKE_LIST_USER_PROFILE = "notif_like_list_user_profile"
448→        const val SOURCE_USER_PROFILE_UNKNOWN = "user_profile_source_unknown"
449→        const val SOURCE_ACTIVITY_LOG_DETAIL = "activity_log_detail"
450→        const val SOURCE_BLOGGING_PROMPTS_VIEW_ANSWERS = "blogging_prompts_my_site_card_view_answers"
451→
452→        const val SOURCE_POST_LIST_SAVED_POST_NOTICE = "post_list_saved_post_notice"
453→
454→        private const val UNKNOWN_VALUE = "unknown"
455→
456→        @JvmStatic
457→        fun trackTag(
458→            stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
459→            tag: String
460→        ) {
461→            val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
462→                TAG_KEY to tag
463→            )
464→            AnalyticsTracker.track(stat, properties)
465→        }
466→
467→        fun isUserProfileSource(source: String): Boolean {
468→            return (source == SOURCE_READER_LIKE_LIST_USER_PROFILE ||
469→                    source == SOURCE_NOTIF_LIKE_LIST_USER_PROFILE ||
470→                    source == SOURCE_USER_PROFILE_UNKNOWN)
471→        }
472→    }
473→}
474→
475→enum class ReaderTab(
476→    val id: Int,
477→    val source: String
478→) {
479→    FOLLOWING(1, ReaderTracker.SOURCE_FOLLOWING),
480→    DISCOVER(2, ReaderTracker.SOURCE_DISCOVER),
481→    LIKED(3, ReaderTracker.SOURCE_LIKED),
482→    SAVED(4, ReaderTracker.SOURCE_SAVED),
483→    CUSTOM(5, ReaderTracker.SOURCE_CUSTOM),
484→    A8C(6, ReaderTracker.SOURCE_A8C),
485→    P2(7, ReaderTracker.SOURCE_P2);
486→
487→    companion object {
488→        fun fromId(id: Int): ReaderTab {
489→            return when (id) {
490→                FOLLOWING.id -> FOLLOWING
491→                DISCOVER.id -> DISCOVER
492→                LIKED.id -> LIKED
493→                SAVED.id -> SAVED
494→                A8C.id -> A8C
495→                P2.id -> P2
496→                CUSTOM.id -> CUSTOM
497→                else -> throw RuntimeException("Unexpected ReaderTab id")
498→            }
499→        }
500→
501→        @JvmStatic
502→        fun transformTagToTab(readerTag: ReaderTag): ReaderTab {
503→            return when {
504→                readerTag.isFollowedSites -> FOLLOWING
505→                readerTag.isPostsILike -> LIKED
506→                readerTag.isBookmarked -> SAVED
507→                readerTag.isDiscover -> DISCOVER
508→                readerTag.isA8C -> A8C
509→                readerTag.isP2 -> P2
510→                else -> CUSTOM
511→            }
512→        }
513→    }
514→}
515→

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.utils
  2→
  3→import androidx.collection.SparseArrayCompat
  4→import androidx.collection.forEach
  5→import androidx.collection.isNotEmpty
  6→import androidx.collection.set
  7→import org.wordpress.android.R
  8→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTag
  9→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagList
 10→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagType
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.menu.dropdown.MenuElementData
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 13→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.indexOrNull
 14→import javax.inject.Inject
 15→
 16→class ReaderTopBarMenuHelper @Inject constructor() {
 17→    fun createMenu(readerTagsList: ReaderTagList): List<MenuElementData> {
 18→        return mutableListOf<MenuElementData>().apply {
 19→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isDiscover }?.let { discoverIndex ->
 20→                add(createDiscoverItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(discoverIndex)))
 21→            }
 22→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isFollowedSites }?.let { followingIndex ->
 23→                add(createSubscriptionsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followingIndex)))
 24→            }
 25→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isBookmarked }?.let { savedIndex ->
 26→                add(createSavedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(savedIndex)))
 27→            }
 28→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isPostsILike }?.let { likedIndex ->
 29→                add(createLikedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(likedIndex)))
 30→            }
 31→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isA8C }?.let { a8cIndex ->
 32→                add(createAutomatticItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(a8cIndex)))
 33→            }
 34→            readerTagsList
 35→                .foldIndexed(SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>()) { index, sparseArray, readerTag ->
 36→                    if (readerTag.tagType == ReaderTagType.CUSTOM_LIST) {
 37→                        sparseArray[index] = readerTag
 38→                    }
 39→                    sparseArray
 40→                }
 41→                .takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
 42→                ?.let { customListsArray ->
 43→                    add(MenuElementData.Divider)
 44→                    add(createCustomListsItem(customListsArray))
 45→                }
 46→        }
 47→    }
 48→
 49→    private fun createDiscoverItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 50→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 51→            id = id,
 52→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_discover),
 53→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_discover_24dp,
 54→        )
 55→    }
 56→
 57→    private fun createSubscriptionsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 58→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 59→            id = id,
 60→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_subscriptions),
 61→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_subscriptions_24dp,
 62→        )
 63→    }
 64→
 65→    private fun createSavedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 66→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 67→            id = id,
 68→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_saved),
 69→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_saved_24dp,
 70→        )
 71→    }
 72→
 73→    private fun createLikedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 74→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 75→            id = id,
 76→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_liked),
 77→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_liked_24dp,
 78→        )
 79→    }
 80→
 81→    private fun createAutomatticItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 82→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 83→            id = id,
 84→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_automattic),
 85→        )
 86→    }
 87→
 88→    private fun createCustomListsItem(customLists: SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>): MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu {
 89→        val customListsMenuItems = mutableListOf<MenuElementData.Item.Single>()
 90→        customLists.forEach { index, readerTag ->
 91→            customListsMenuItems.add(
 92→                MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 93→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(index),
 94→                    text = UiString.UiStringText(readerTag.tagTitle),
 95→                )
 96→            )
 97→        }
 98→        return MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu(
 99→            // We don't need this ID since this menu item just opens the sub-menu. It doesn't
100→            // change the content that is currently being displayed.
101→            id = "custom-lists",
102→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_lists),
103→            children = customListsMenuItems,
104→        )
105→    }
106→
107→    private fun getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(readerTagIndex: Int): String = "$readerTagIndex"
108→
109→    fun getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(menuItem: MenuElementData.Item.Single) = menuItem.id.toInt()
110→}
111→

426→        private const val SOURCE_KEY = "source"
427→        const val SOURCE_FOLLOWING = "following"
428→        const val SOURCE_DISCOVER = "discover"
429→        const val SOURCE_LIKED = "liked"
430→        const val SOURCE_SAVED = "saved"
431→        const val SOURCE_CUSTOM = "custom"
432→        const val SOURCE_A8C = "a8c"
433→        const val SOURCE_P2 = "p2"
434→        const val SOURCE_SETTINGS = "subscriptions"
435→        const val SOURCE_SEARCH = "search"
436→        const val SOURCE_SITE_PREVIEW = "site_preview"
437→        const val SOURCE_TAG_PREVIEW = "tag_preview"
438→        const val SOURCE_POST_DETAIL = "post_detail"
439→        const val SOURCE_POST_DETAIL_TOOLBAR = "post_detail_toolbar"
440→        const val SOURCE_POST_DETAIL_COMMENT_SNIPPET = "post_detail_comment_snippet"
441→        const val SOURCE_COMMENT = "comment"
442→        const val SOURCE_USER = "user"
443→        const val SOURCE_STATS = "stats"
444→        const val SOURCE_NOTIFICATION = "notification"
445→        const val SOURCE_READER_LIKE_LIST = "reader_like_list"
446→        const val SOURCE_READER_LIKE_LIST_USER_PROFILE = "reader_like_list_user_profile"
447→        const val SOURCE_NOTIF_LIKE_LIST_USER_PROFILE = "notif_like_list_user_profile"
448→        const val SOURCE_USER_PROFILE_UNKNOWN = "user_profile_source_unknown"
449→        const val SOURCE_ACTIVITY_LOG_DETAIL = "activity_log_detail"
450→        const val SOURCE_BLOGGING_PROMPTS_VIEW_ANSWERS = "blogging_prompts_my_site_card_view_answers"
451→
452→        const val SOURCE_POST_LIST_SAVED_POST_NOTICE = "post_list_saved_post_notice"
453→
454→        private const val UNKNOWN_VALUE = "unknown"
455→
456→        @JvmStatic
457→        fun trackTag(
458→            stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
459→            tag: String
460→        ) {
461→            val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
462→                TAG_KEY to tag
463→            )
464→            AnalyticsTracker.track(stat, properties)
465→        }
466→
467→        fun isUserProfileSource(source: String): Boolean {
468→            return (source == SOURCE_READER_LIKE_LIST_USER_PROFILE ||
469→                    source == SOURCE_NOTIF_LIKE_LIST_USER_PROFILE ||
470→                    source == SOURCE_USER_PROFILE_UNKNOWN)
471→        }
472→    }
473→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.tracker
  2→
  3→import android.net.Uri
  4→import androidx.annotation.MainThread
  5→import org.wordpress.android.analytics.AnalyticsTracker
  6→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderPost
  7→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTag
  8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.prefs.AppPrefsWrapper
  9→import org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.ReaderTypes.ReaderPostListType
 10→import org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.utils.DateProvider
 11→import org.wordpress.android.util.AppLog
 12→import org.wordpress.android.util.DateTimeUtils
 13→import org.wordpress.android.util.analytics.AnalyticsTrackerWrapper
 14→import org.wordpress.android.util.analytics.AnalyticsUtilsWrapper
 15→import javax.inject.Inject
 16→import javax.inject.Singleton
 17→
 18→@Singleton
 19→@MainThread
 20→@Suppress("ForbiddenComment")
 21→class ReaderTracker @Inject constructor(
 22→    private val dateProvider: DateProvider,
 23→    private val appPrefsWrapper: AppPrefsWrapper,
 24→    private val analyticsTrackerWrapper: AnalyticsTrackerWrapper,
 25→    private val analyticsUtilsWrapper: AnalyticsUtilsWrapper
 26→) {
 27→    // TODO: evaluate to use something like Dispatchers.Main.Immediate in the fun(s)
 28→    // to sync the access to trackers; so to remove the @MainThread and make the
 29→    // usage of this class more transparent to its users
 30→    private val trackers = mutableMapOf<ReaderTrackerType, ReaderTrackerInfo>()
 31→
 32→    init {
 33→        for (trackerType in ReaderTrackerType.values()) {
 34→            trackers[trackerType] = ReaderTrackerInfo()
 35→        }
 36→    }
 37→
 38→    fun setupTrackers() {
 39→        for (key in trackers.keys) {
 40→            trackers[key] = ReaderTrackerInfo()
 41→        }
 42→    }
 43→
 44→    fun start(type: ReaderTrackerType) {
 45→        trackers[type]?.let {
 46→            if (!isRunning(type)) {
 47→                AppLog.d(AppLog.T.MAIN, "ReaderTracker: started $type")
 48→                trackers[type] = it.copy(startDate = dateProvider.getCurrentDate())
 49→            }
 50→        }
 51→    }
 52→
 53→    fun stop(type: ReaderTrackerType) {
 54→        trackers[type]?.let { trackerInfo ->
 55→            if (isRunning(type)) {
 56→                AppLog.d(AppLog.T.MAIN, "ReaderTracker: stopped $type")
 57→                trackerInfo.startDate?.let { startDate ->
 58→                    val accumulatedTime = trackerInfo.accumulatedTime +
 59→                            DateTimeUtils.secondsBetween(dateProvider.getCurrentDate(), startDate)
 60→                    // let reset the startDate to null
 61→                    trackers[type] = ReaderTrackerInfo(accumulatedTime = accumulatedTime)
 62→                } ?: AppLog.e(AppLog.T.READER, "ReaderTracker > stop found a null startDate")
 63→            }
 64→        }
 65→    }
 66→
 67→    fun isRunning(type: ReaderTrackerType): Boolean {
 68→        return trackers[type]?.startDate != null
 69→    }
 70→
 71→    fun getAnalyticsData(): Map<String, Any> {
 72→        return trackers.entries.associate { it.key.propertyName to it.value.accumulatedTime }
 73→    }
 74→
 75→    fun trackReaderTabIfNecessary(readerTab: ReaderTab) {
 76→        if (readerTab != appPrefsWrapper.getReaderActiveTab()) {
 77→            when (readerTab) {
 78→                ReaderTab.FOLLOWING -> analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_FOLLOWING_SHOWN)
 79→                ReaderTab.DISCOVER -> analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_DISCOVER_SHOWN)
 80→                ReaderTab.LIKED -> analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_LIKED_SHOWN)
 81→                ReaderTab.SAVED -> analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
 82→                    AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_SAVED_LIST_SHOWN,
 83→                    mapOf("source" to "reader_filter")
 84→                )
 85→                ReaderTab.A8C -> analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_A8C_SHOWN)
 86→                ReaderTab.P2 -> analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_P2_SHOWN)
 87→                ReaderTab.CUSTOM -> analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_CUSTOM_TAB_SHOWN)
 88→            }
 89→            appPrefsWrapper.setReaderActiveTab(readerTab)
 90→        }
 91→    }
 92→
 93→    fun onAppGoesToBackground() {
 94→        appPrefsWrapper.setReaderActiveTab(null)
 95→    }
 96→
 97→    fun onBottomNavigationTabChanged() {
 98→        appPrefsWrapper.setReaderActiveTab(null)
 99→    }
100→
101→    /* TRACK */
102→
103→    fun track(
104→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat
105→    ) {
106→        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(stat)
107→    }
108→
109→    fun track(
110→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
111→        source: String
112→    ) {
113→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
114→            SOURCE_KEY to source
115→        )
116→        track(stat, properties)
117→    }
118→
119→    fun track(
120→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
121→        properties: MutableMap<String, *>
122→    ) {
123→        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(stat, properties)
124→    }
125→
126→    /* BLOG */
127→
128→    fun trackBlog(
129→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
130→        blogId: Long,
131→        feedId: Long
132→    ) {
133→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
134→            BLOG_ID_KEY to blogId(blogId, feedId),
135→            FEED_ID_KEY to feedId
136→        )
137→        track(stat, properties)
138→    }
139→
140→    fun trackBlog(
141→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
142→        blogId: Long,
143→        feedId: Long,
144→        isFollowed: Boolean?
145→    ) {
146→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
147→            BLOG_ID_KEY to blogId(blogId, feedId),
148→            FEED_ID_KEY to feedId,
149→            FOLLOW_KEY to (isFollowed ?: UNKNOWN_VALUE)
150→        )
151→        track(stat, properties)
152→    }
153→
154→    fun trackBlog(
155→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
156→        blogId: Long,
157→        feedId: Long,
158→        source: String
159→    ) {
160→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
161→            BLOG_ID_KEY to blogId(blogId, feedId),
162→            FEED_ID_KEY to feedId,
163→            SOURCE_KEY to source
164→        )
165→        track(stat, properties)
166→    }
167→
168→    fun trackBlog(
169→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
170→        blogId: Long,
171→        feedId: Long,
172→        isFollowed: Boolean?,
173→        source: String
174→    ) {
175→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
176→            BLOG_ID_KEY to blogId(blogId, feedId),
177→            FEED_ID_KEY to feedId,
178→            FOLLOW_KEY to (isFollowed ?: UNKNOWN_VALUE),
179→            SOURCE_KEY to source
180→        )
181→        track(stat, properties)
182→    }
183→
184→    /**
185→     * The [org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderBlog.fromJson] method within this model class has a logic where it
186→     * checks whether the blogs 'blogId' is 0, if it is, then it checks whether the 'feedId' is not 0. If both
187→     * conditions are met then it assigns the 'feedId' to 'blogId'. It does that in order to keep consistency with the
188→     * '/read/' endpoints.
189→     *
190→     * This tracking function captures that and does the opposite in order to make sure that the tracking is done to the
191→     * absolute. As such, it check whether the 'feedId' is equal to the 'blogId' and if so it assigns 0 to the 'blog_id'
192→     * tracking property. Else, as should, it assigns the actual 'blogId' to the 'blog_id' tracking property.
193→     */
194→    private fun blogId(blogId: Long, feedId: Long) = if (feedId == blogId) 0 else blogId
195→
196→    /* TAG */
197→
198→    fun trackTag(
199→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
200→        tag: String,
201→        source: String
202→    ) {
203→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
204→            TAG_KEY to tag,
205→            SOURCE_KEY to source
206→        )
207→        track(stat, properties)
208→    }
209→
210→    fun trackTagQuantity(
211→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
212→        quantity: Int
213→    ) {
214→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
215→            QUANTITY_KEY to quantity
216→        )
217→        track(stat, properties)
218→    }
219→
220→    /* POST */
221→
222→    fun trackBlogPost(
223→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
224→        blogId: Long,
225→        postId: Long
226→    ) {
227→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
228→            BLOG_ID_KEY to blogId,
229→            POST_ID_KEY to postId
230→        )
231→        track(stat, properties)
232→    }
233→
234→    fun trackBlogPost(
235→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
236→        blogId: Long,
237→        postId: Long,
238→        isJetpack: Boolean
239→    ) {
240→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
241→            BLOG_ID_KEY to blogId,
242→            POST_ID_KEY to postId,
243→            IS_JETPACK_KEY to isJetpack
244→        )
245→        track(stat, properties)
246→    }
247→
248→    fun trackBlogPostAuthor(
249→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
250→        blogId: Long,
251→        postId: Long,
252→        isJetpack: Boolean,
253→        userId: Long
254→    ) {
255→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
256→            BLOG_ID_KEY to blogId,
257→            POST_ID_KEY to postId,
258→            IS_JETPACK_KEY to isJetpack,
259→            USER_ID_KEY to userId
260→        )
261→        track(stat, properties)
262→    }
263→
264→    fun trackBlogPost(
265→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
266→        blogId: String,
267→        postId: String,
268→        commentId: Int
269→    ) {
270→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
271→            BLOG_ID_KEY to blogId,
272→            POST_ID_KEY to postId,
273→            COMMENT_ID_KEY to commentId
274→        )
275→        track(stat, properties)
276→    }
277→
278→    fun trackFeedPost(
279→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
280→        feedId: Long,
281→        feedItemId: Long
282→    ) {
283→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
284→            FEED_ID_KEY to feedId,
285→            FEED_ITEM_ID_KEY to feedItemId
286→        )
287→        track(stat, properties)
288→    }
289→
290→    fun trackPost(
291→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
292→        post: ReaderPost?
293→    ) {
294→        trackPost(stat, post, mutableMapOf<String, Any>())
295→    }
296→
297→    fun trackPost(
298→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
299→        post: ReaderPost?,
300→        source: String
301→    ) {
302→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
303→            SOURCE_KEY to source
304→        )
305→        trackPost(stat, post, properties)
306→    }
307→
308→    private fun trackPost(
309→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
310→        post: ReaderPost?,
311→        properties: MutableMap<String, *>
312→    ) {
313→        analyticsUtilsWrapper.trackWithReaderPostDetails(
314→            stat,
315→            post,
316→            properties
317→        )
318→    }
319→
320→    fun trackPostComments(
321→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
322→        blogId: Long,
323→        postId: Long,
324→        post: ReaderPost?,
325→        properties: MutableMap<String, *>
326→    ) {
327→        analyticsUtilsWrapper.trackFollowCommentsWithReaderPostDetails(
328→            stat,
329→            blogId,
330→            postId,
331→            post,
332→            properties
333→        )

335→
336→    /* OTHER */
337→
338→    /**
339→     * Track when app launched via deep-linking but then fell back to external browser
340→     *
341→     * @param stat The Stat to bump
342→     * @param interceptedUri The fallback URI the app was started with
343→     */
344→    fun trackUri(
345→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
346→        interceptedUri: String
347→    ) {
348→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(
349→            INTERCEPTED_URI_KEY to interceptedUri
350→        )
351→        track(stat, properties)

354→    fun trackQuery(
355→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,

357→    ) {
358→        val properties = mutableMapOf<String, Any>(

360→        )

365→        stat: AnalyticsTracker.Stat,
366→        action: String,

369→    ) {
370→        analyticsUtilsWrapper.trackWithDeepLinkData(stat, action, host, uri)
371→    }

373→    fun trackRailcar(
374→        railcarJson: String
375→    ) {
376→        analyticsUtilsWrapper.trackRailcarRender(railcarJson)
377→    }
378→
379→    fun trackDropdownMenuOpened() {
380→        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_DROPDOWN_MENU_OPENED)
381→    }
382→
383→    fun trackDropdownMenuItemTapped(readerTag: ReaderTag) {
384→        when {
385→            readerTag.isDiscover -> "discover"
386→            readerTag.isFollowedSites -> "following"
387→            readerTag.isBookmarked -> "saved"
388→            readerTag.isPostsILike -> "liked"
389→            readerTag.isA8C -> "a8c"
390→            readerTag.isListTopic -> "list"
391→            else -> null
392→        }?.let { trackingId ->
393→            analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
394→                stat = AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_DROPDOWN_MENU_ITEM_TAPPED,
395→                properties = mapOf("id" to trackingId)
396→            )
397→        }
398→    }
399→
400→    /* HELPER */
401→
402→    @JvmOverloads
403→    fun getSource(
404→        postListType: ReaderPostListType,
405→        readerTab: ReaderTab? = null
406→    ): String = if (postListType == ReaderPostListType.TAG_FOLLOWED) {
407→        readerTab?.source ?: UNKNOWN_VALUE
408→    } else {
409→        postListType.source
410→    }

475→enum class ReaderTab(
476→    val id: Int,
477→    val source: String
478→) {
479→    FOLLOWING(1, ReaderTracker.SOURCE_FOLLOWING),
480→    DISCOVER(2, ReaderTracker.SOURCE_DISCOVER),
481→    LIKED(3, ReaderTracker.SOURCE_LIKED),
482→    SAVED(4, ReaderTracker.SOURCE_SAVED),
483→    CUSTOM(5, ReaderTracker.SOURCE_CUSTOM),
484→    A8C(6, ReaderTracker.SOURCE_A8C),
485→    P2(7, ReaderTracker.SOURCE_P2);
486→
487→    companion object {
488→        fun fromId(id: Int): ReaderTab {
489→            return when (id) {
490→                FOLLOWING.id -> FOLLOWING
491→                DISCOVER.id -> DISCOVER
492→                LIKED.id -> LIKED
493→                SAVED.id -> SAVED
494→                A8C.id -> A8C
495→                P2.id -> P2
496→                CUSTOM.id -> CUSTOM
497→                else -> throw RuntimeException("Unexpected ReaderTab id")
498→            }
499→        }
500→
501→        @JvmStatic
502→        fun transformTagToTab(readerTag: ReaderTag): ReaderTab {
503→            return when {
504→                readerTag.isFollowedSites -> FOLLOWING
505→                readerTag.isPostsILike -> LIKED
506→                readerTag.isBookmarked -> SAVED
507→                readerTag.isDiscover -> DISCOVER
508→                readerTag.isA8C -> A8C
509→                readerTag.isP2 -> P2
510→                else -> CUSTOM
511→            }
512→        }
513→    }
514→}
